commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3f285446ada75c93d448022eec98ea3fdcec64ad)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves MS Teams pending upload and SSO token stores plus voice-call call history from JSON/JSONL sidecar files into SQLite-backed plugin state with migration and regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +774, Tests +373. Total +1147 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: pass `openclaw voicecall tail` or `latency` an explicit existing custom path ending in `calls.jsonl`; the PR condition routes it to SQLite instead of reading that file. Current docs and current main both support treating `--file` as the literal JSONL file path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can preserve explicit `--file` JSONL handling and add a regression test without changing the migration design.

target.title: refactor: move plugin state stores to SQLite
target.body:
## Summary

- Move MS Teams pending uploads and SSO token persistence from plugin JSON files into SQLite-backed plugin state, with legacy JSON import, bounded chunk storage, and explicit prune cleanup.
- Move voice-call call history to SQLite-backed plugin state when the runtime state store is available, while preserving JSONL fallback for unavailable state stores, oversized call records, and explicit non-default CLI files.
- Add regression coverage for migration markers, malformed legacy data, long keys, chunk limits, ordering, fallback reads, and CLI access to SQLite-backed history.

## Verification

- pnpm test extensions/msteams/src/pending-uploads-fs.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/sso-token-store.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager/store.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/cli.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager/store.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/cli.test.ts
- env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: MS Teams plugin transient upload/token state and voice-call history now use SQLite-backed plugin state instead of new JSON sidecar writes where plugin state is available.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on Node/pnpm with the changed plugin tests and changed-check gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm test extensions/msteams/src/pending-uploads-fs.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/sso-token-store.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/manager/store.test.ts; pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/cli.test.ts; env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed; .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed for the migrated stores and CLI path; changed-check passed typecheck, lint, sidecar loader, media helper, and import-cycle guards; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: migrated state round-trips through plugin state, legacy JSON imports remain readable, oversized/unavailable-state voice-call records remain readable from JSONL fallback, and CLI default calls.jsonl history can read SQLite-backed history.

What was not tested: full cross-platform release packaging and live MS Teams or voice-call provider flows.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
